items.claim: Robert Whittaker has a history of being finished in his recent fights.
items.quote: he lost to Khamzat Chimaev, he had his teeth smashed, he got knocked out against Israel Adesanya.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is moving up to the light heavyweight division.
Robert Whittaker possesses high-level striking and grappling skills.
items.quote: He's very well-rounded, he's very quick, he's got excellent footwork... he's got real power, whether it's with the head kicks or with the hands, the man can wrestle, he's got excellent jiu-jitsu

items.claim: Moving up to 205 lbs will allow Robert Whittaker to take a better shot.
items.quote: I think at 205, he'll be able to take a better shot.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov has significant experience and finishing ability.
items.quote: He has got ridiculous experience, okay? And he's got power and submission.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney's fights rarely extend past the first round.
items.quote: His fights very rarely get out of the first round.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney has a tendency to mentally collapse or make mistakes if he does not finish his opponent early.
items.quote: He has a brain fart, he gives up on himself, he malfunctions or whatever, there's a short circuit in his brain, he makes a mistake, he kind of quits and he gets finished.

items.claim: Bobby Green has been finished multiple times in his recent career.
items.quote: he has been finished a few times. Whether that's by a submission to Paddy Pimblett... he got knocked out against Jalin Turner... He also got knocked out against Mauricio Ruffey.

items.claim: Bobby Green is currently on a three-fight win streak.
items.quote: He's now on a three fight win streak over Jeremy Stephens, Daniel Zellhuber, that was a big one, and Lance Gibson Jr.
